# sipi.bot

> The spend firewall for autonomous AI agents. One call before an agent spends
> money returns APPROVED, BLOCKED, or FLAGGED (needs human approval) against your
> rules: per-transaction caps, daily totals, velocity (runaway-loop protection),
> merchant allow/block, category limits, time windows, approval thresholds.

## What it is
sipi.bot is agent-economy infrastructure: a guardrail an autonomous agent calls
before spending, so a runaway loop or bad merchant never drains a card. Exposed
as an MCP tool, an HTTP API, and a CLI. Open-source core (MIT), free to self-host.

## Core endpoint
- POST https://sipi.bot/v1/transactions/evaluate — body: {amount, merchant, category}. Returns {decision, reason}.

## Key pages
- Home: https://sipi.bot
- Dashboard (live decisions, approvals, rules): https://sipi.bot/dashboard
- Pricing (Team $99/mo, Business $499/mo): https://sipi.bot/pricing
- Eval report JSON (53/53 scenarios): https://sipi.bot/eval
- Eval report, human-readable: https://sipi.bot/eval-report/
- Agent card: https://sipi.bot/.well-known/agent-card.json
- Source: https://github.com/kindrat86/sipi-bot

## Framework integrations
LangChain, CrewAI, OpenAI Agents SDK, Vercel AI SDK — see the repo /integrations.

## Install
pip install sipi-bot · MCP: python -m spendfirewall.mcp_server

## Contact
https://sipi.bot · sales@sipiteno.com
